revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-5-395

Those conditions, including agreement on rates of payment and time for completion, detailed by the client under which the contract for undertaking certain works is to be performed, forming a legally binding document.
